# Measurement / source dictionary (P1 first tranche)

Channels with `canonical unit = — (native)` are NOT resolved SI quantities and must not be pooled onto a physical axis (e.g. ambiguous reported flow).

| channel | quantity kind | raw unit | canonical unit | commanded/achieved | ambiguity | eligibility |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| flow_goal_reported__native | flow_UNRESOLVED | native | — (native) | commanded | volumetric_or_mass_or_proxy | exploratory_proxy_flow |
| flow_reported__native | flow_UNRESOLVED | native | — (native) | achieved | volumetric_or_mass_or_proxy | exploratory_proxy_flow |
| mass_flow_from_scale__kg_per_s | mass_flow | g/s | kg/s | achieved | — | mass_flow_tracking |
| pressure__Pa | pressure | bar | Pa | achieved | — | pressure_tracking |
| pressure_goal__Pa | pressure | bar | Pa | commanded | — | pressure_tracking |
| state_change | categorical_state | code | code | achieved | — | metadata |
| time__s | time | s | s | achieved | — | core |
| weight__kg | cumulative_mass | g | kg | achieved | — | weight_tracking |
